title: rich chewy malaysian noodles biryani
description: a hearty and flavorful malaysian-inspired noodle dish featuring rich chewy texture and a blend of aromatic spices. great for kids and high-protein diets.

ingredients.name: curry powder
ingredients.notes: any store-bought or homemade spice blend will work.

instructions: heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the sliced onion and cook until it starts to brown, about 3 minutes.
add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through.
remove the cooked chicken from the skillet and set it aside on a plate.
add the curry powder to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
add the rice and noodles to the skillet, stirring to coat with the curry powder mixture.
add the water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the rice and noodles are tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
add the cooked chicken back to the skillet and stir to combine with the rice and noodles.
season with salt and pepper to taste.
